title: Fix status line Python detection across all systems

checklist.text: Fix Python detection in scripts/render-status-line.sh (lines 8-13): replace `command -v python3` with `python3 -c "import sys"` test so the Windows Store stub is correctly identified as non-functional
Apply the same Python detection fix in scripts/run-integrity-fast.sh (lines 42-48)

Verify status line works after fix: run `echo '{"model":{"display_name":"test"},"context_window":{"used_percentage":42}}' | bash scripts/render-status-line.sh claude` and confirm single-line output with no errors; also run `bash scripts/run-integrity-fast.sh` to confirm integrity checks still pass

title: Add SessionStart hook to inject AGENTS-hot policy into Claude Code

checklist.text: Create .claude/hooks/inject-agents-policy.sh: reads $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/AGENTS-hot.md (project scope) with fallback to ~/AGENTS-hot.md (user scope), outputs JSON {"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"<content>"}}; must handle file-not-found gracefully and be fast (cat/printf only, no heavy tools)
Create .claude/hooks/inject-agents-policy.ps1: PowerShell counterpart with identical logic for cross-OS parity

Add SessionStart hook entry to .claude/settings.json: hooks.SessionStart array with matcher for startup|resume|clear|compact events, command `bash "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/hooks/inject-agents-policy.sh"`; preserve existing statusLine and autoUpdatesChannel settings
Add .claude/hooks directory entry to deploy/manifest.txt so hook scripts are deployed alongside other .claude assets

Verify hook works: run `bash -n .claude/hooks/inject-agents-policy.sh` (syntax check), run PowerShell parse check on .ps1 counterpart, then start a new Claude Code session and confirm AGENTS-hot rules appear in context; verify /hooks command shows the configured hook

title: Automate adapter sync for Codex and Cursor to prevent policy drift

checklist.text: Create scripts/sync-adapters.sh: reads AGENTS-hot.md, AGENTS-warm.md, AGENTS-cold.md and regenerates .codex/AGENTS.md (header comment + hot-tier content + codex-specific footer), .cursor/rules/01-agents-policy.mdc (frontmatter + hot-tier + cursor canonical sources footer), .cursor/rules/02-agents-warm.mdc (frontmatter + warm-tier), .cursor/rules/03-agents-cold.mdc (frontmatter + cold-tier); supports --check mode (exit 1 if any adapter is out of sync) and --dry-run mode; must preserve system-specific headers/footers and Cursor alwaysApply: true frontmatter exactly
Create scripts/sync-adapters.ps1: PowerShell counterpart with identical logic for cross-OS parity
Add `sync-adapters.sh --check` call to scripts/run-integrity-fast.sh validation pipeline (after validate-parity.sh) so the pre-commit hook catches adapter drift automatically
Update scripts/extract-agents-tier.sh to call sync-adapters.sh after generating tier files in non-check mode, so adapter files are always regenerated when tiers change

Verify end-to-end: run `bash scripts/extract-agents-tier.sh` and confirm adapters update; run `bash scripts/sync-adapters.sh --check` and confirm it passes; run `bash scripts/run-integrity-fast.sh` and confirm full pipeline passes; modify AGENTS.md hot tier, re-extract, and verify adapters auto-update
